metadata.title: Global Agentic OS Dashboard
metadata.sourcePolicy: Local folder mode only. No GitHub status was used.

summary.overallStatus: Both products are in active distribution sprint. RunSmart iOS is in ASO finalization (submit target 2026-06-01). ResumeBuilder Web has distribution scaffold v1 installed and first ASO session is ready to run.
summary.bestNextAction: RunSmart iOS: copy approved description to fastlane, render screenshot overlays (rs-aso-002), then archive and submit. ResumeBuilder: run first ASO session using .agent-os/distribution/app-store-program.md.
mainBlockers: RunSmart iOS: approved description (rs-aso-001) and screenshot overlays (rs-aso-002) need to be applied before App Store submission.
RunSmart iOS: rs-analytics-001 (PostHog instrumentation) must be executed before lifecycle email triggers are meaningful.
ResumeBuilder iOS: five-tab simulator smoke QA still pending; Resume Library backend endpoints not live.
ResumeBuilder distribution: ASO metadata, RTL PDF status, and iOS pricing model all need founder confirmation before first ASO session.
needsDecision: RunSmart iOS: whether one focused physical-device pass is enough before archive/upload readiness.
ResumeBuilder iOS: whether the PR can proceed with the mock library service while backend endpoints are pending.

projects.name: RunSmart iOS
projects.status: ASO finalization sprint. Distribution scaffold v1 installed 2026-05-28. Approved description (rs-aso-001) and screenshot overlays (rs-aso-002) ready to apply. Submit target: 2026-06-01.
projects.distributionStatus: Distribution scaffold v1 installed; ASO finalization in progress (rs-aso-001 approved, submit target 2026-06-01)
projects.activeStory: Apply rs-aso-001 description + rs-aso-002 screenshot overlays; execute rs-analytics-001 PostHog spec
projects.lastCompletedStory: Story 10: TestFlight Polish And Privacy Review, plus Agent OS status source-of-truth consolidation
projects.nextRecommendedStory: Physical-device outdoor/background recording check, then archive/upload readiness
projects.lastValidation: 2026-05-15 physical-device Debug build passed on connected iPhone 13, bundle id com.runsmart.lite; simulator build passed; latest full iPhone 17 XCTest attempt still stalled with NSMachErrorDomain Code=-308.
projects.validationState: Builds passed; manual outdoor/background/battery QA is missing.
blockers: Manual outdoor/background recording and battery-delta check remains open.
External beta readiness is blocked on manual physical-device run QA.
nextActions: Run the manual outdoor/background recording and battery-delta check on the connected iPhone.
Record exact device, route/run duration, lock/background behavior, battery delta, and GPS/permission issues in local task files.
After device QA passes, run archive/upload readiness: signing, bundle id, privacy strings, App Store Connect, and TestFlight release notes.

projects.name: Atlas
projects.role: Cross-project coordination for tasks, context, specs, QA, workflows, and agents.
projects.status: Future orchestration concept. Do not build before the workflow is proven manually.
projects.nextRecommendedStory: Keep manual workflow lightweight; automate only after repeated patterns are proven.

blockers: Atlas repo path is not confirmed.

nextActions: Use the Global Agentic OS dashboard as a manual coordination layer.
Keep local project repos as source of truth.
Record repeatable workflows before building Atlas automation.

decisionBoard.decision: Is one focused physical-device run enough before archive prep?
decisionBoard.whyItMatters: External beta depends on real background/battery confidence.
decisionBoard.options: One focused device check; broader device matrix; pause for more automation.
decisionBoard.recommendedOption: One focused outdoor/background/battery check, then archive readiness review.

decisionBoard.decision: Can ResumeBuilder PR proceed while Resume Library uses mocks?
decisionBoard.whyItMatters: The five-story spec is complete, but backend endpoints are pending.
decisionBoard.options: PR now with mock flag; wait for backend; split PR.
decisionBoard.recommendedOption: PR after smoke QA, clearly documenting mock flag and backend dependency.

decisionBoard.whyItMatters: Real library behavior depends on web/backend /api/v1/resumes.
decisionBoard.options: Flip now; flip after backend ships; keep mocks for TestFlight.
decisionBoard.recommendedOption: Flip only after backend endpoint is live and tested.
